This product includes Qt 6 libraries made available under the GNU Lesser General Public License version 3 and other open-source licenses used by Qt.

The OpenMidgard executable dynamically links against Qt runtime DLLs. You may replace those Qt DLLs with a modified, interface-compatible version for debugging your modifications, and reverse engineering for that purpose is not restricted by this product's license terms.

Copies of the applicable GNU LGPLv3 and GNU GPLv3 texts are included in this directory.

If you distribute a build of this product that includes Qt, you must also provide the complete corresponding source code for the exact Qt libraries you ship, including any modifications, or a valid written offer / download location that satisfies the LGPL requirements for your distribution model.

This notice is provided as technical packaging guidance only and is not legal advice.
